name: Snake
description: Classic snake game where you control a snake to eat food and grow longer without hitting walls or yourself.

name: Tetris
description: Arrange falling blocks to clear lines and achieve high scores.

name: Pong
description: Classic paddle ball game. Control the paddle to bounce the ball past your opponent.

name: Breakout
description: Break bricks with a ball and paddle. Destroy all bricks to win.

name: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from alien invaders by shooting them down.

name: Flappy Bird
description: Navigate a bird through pipes by tapping to flap. Avoid obstacles.
Slide tiles to combine numbers and reach 2048.

name: Tic Tac Toe
description: Classic 3x3 grid game. Get three in a row to win.

name: Memory Game
description: Flip cards to find matching pairs. Test your memory skills.

name: Frogger
description: Help the frog cross roads and rivers to reach home.

name: Pacman
description: Eat dots while avoiding ghosts in the maze.

name: Asteroids
description: Destroy asteroids and alien ships in space.

name: Minesweeper
description: Find all mines on the grid without detonating them.

name: Connect Four
description: Drop pieces to connect four in a row vertically, horizontally, or diagonally.

name: Chess
description: Strategic board game with kings, queens, and other pieces.
